100201.Content: When using an Ultimate Skill, all skill <style="emph-gn">CDs</style> accelerate by <style="accent-gn">100%</style>, and <style="emph-gn">combat resource</style> recovery speed increases by <style="accent-gn">100%</style> for <style="accent-gn">20s</style>

100301.Content:
Increases ATK by 5% for the user and allies within 10m.
For each role type present within the area, this bonus increases by 5% (up to 20%)

100401.Content:
Each Expertise Skill cast increases its DMG and Healing by 0.2%.
Stacks up to 200 times. When fully stacked, grants 20% Expertise Skill DMG and Healing boost

100501.Content:
Each Special Attack increases its DMG and Healing by 0.2%.
Stacks up to 200 times. When fully stacked, grants 20% Special Attack DMG and Healing boost

100601.Content: <style="emph-gn">Haste</style><style="accent-gn"> +20%</style>. Loses <style="accent-gn">8%</style> HP per second while moving in combat

100701.Content: Reduces <style="emph-gn">Ultimate Skill</style> CD by <style="accent-gn">1%</style> per <style="accent-gn">200</style> Haste (up to <style="accent-gn">50%</style>)

100801.Content: Defeating a target reduces the remaining <style="emph-gn">Expertise Skill</style> CD by <style="accent-gn">10%</style>

100901.Content: <style="emph-gn">Special Attacks</style> reduce the remaining <style="emph-gn">Expertise Skill</style> CD by <style="accent-gn">0.5s</style>

101001.Content: <style="emph-gn">Defeating</style> a target increases <style="emph-gn">Crit DMG</style> by <style="accent-gn">10%</style> for <style="accent-gn">5s</style> (up to <style="accent-gn">30%</style>)

101101.Content: When dealing damage to targets with more than <style="accent-gn">80%</style> HP, <style="emph-gn">Crit DMG</style> <style="accent-gn">+60%</style>

101201.Content: <style="emph-gn">ATK</style> <style="accent-gn">+25%</style>. If HP is above <style="accent-gn">30%</style>, each attack consumes <style="accent-gn">2.5%</style> of HP

101301.Content: For every <style="accent-gn">1%</style> HP lost, grants <style="accent-gn">0.3%</style><style="emph-gn"> ATK</style>. Each Bloodwrath entry grants <style="accent-gn">0.1%</style> ATK boost

101401.Content: Landing a <style="emph-gn">Lucky Strike</style> triggers <style="emph-gn">Blood Blast</style>, dealing DMG equal to </style>20%<style="accent-gn"> of lost HP (CD: <style="accent-gn">1s</style>)

101501.Content: When HP is below <style="accent-gn">30%</style>, converts <style="accent-gn">10%</style> of <style="emph-gn">DMG dealt</style> into a <style="emph-gn">Shield</style>. Stacks up to <style="accent-gn">100%</style> of Max HP

101701.Content: Attacks trigger <style="emph-gn">Bloodwar</style>, increasing <style="emph-gn">ATK</style> by <style="accent-gn">20%</style> and preventing death for <style="accent-gn">3s</style>

101801.Content: <style="emph-gn">ATK</style><style="accent-gn"> +25%</style>, but takes DMG equal to <style="accent-gn">1%</style> of <style="emph-gn">Max HP</style> per second

101901.Content: Deals AoE DMG equal to <style="accent-gn">20%</style> of <style="emph-gn">Max HP</style> every <style="accent-gn">3s</style>

102101.Content: Landing a <style="emph-gn">Lucky Strike</style> grants you a <style="emph-gn">Shield</style> equal to <style="accent-gn">20%</style> <style="emph-gn">Max HP</style>

102201.Content: When hit, deals AoE DMG equal to <style="accent-gn">10%</style> <style="emph-gn">Max HP</style>

102301.Content: When hit, reduces the remaining <style="emph-gn">CD</style> of all skills by <style="accent-gn">1s</style>

102401.Content: <style="emph-gn">Max HP</style><style="accent-gn"> +100%</style>, but takes DMG equal to <style="accent-gn">1%</style> of <style="emph-gn">Max HP</style> per second

102501.Content: When dealing damage with Class Skills, attacks deal bonus DMG equal to <style="accent-gn">0.2%</style> of the enemy's <style="emph-gn">current HP</style>

102801.Content: Reflects AoE DMG equal to <style="accent-gn">400%</style> of <style="emph-gn">Armor</style> when hit

102901.Content: When healing a target, deals Class Skill DMG to enemies around them equal to <style="accent-gn">100%</style> of the healing potency every <style="accent-gn">1s</style> (healing is accumulated during this time)

103001.Content: Every <style="accent-gn">10</style><style="emph-gn"> Special Attacks</style> permanently increase <style="emph-gn">Healing Amount</style> by <style="accent-gn">1%</style> (up to <style="accent-gn">30%</style>)

103101.Content: Allies within 10m gain a <style="emph-gn">Shield</style> equal to <style="accent-gn">20%</style> of their <style="emph-gn">Max HP</style> every <style="accent-gn">10s</style>

103401.Content: Landing a <style="emph-gn">Lucky Strike</style> triggers <style="emph-gn">Lightning Strike</style>, dealing <style="emph-gn">DMG</style> equal to <style="accent-gn">45%</style> of ATK (CD: <style="accent-gn">1s</style>)

103501.Content: Landing a <style="emph-gn">Lucky Strike</style> triggers <style="emph-gn">Blade Storm</style>, dealing <style="emph-gn">DMG</style><style="accent-gn"> equal to 45%</style> of ATK (CD: <style="accent-gn">1s</style>)

103601.Content: Landing a <style="emph-gn">Lucky Strike</style> triggers <style="emph-gn">Fireball Explosion</style>, dealing <style="emph-gn">DMG</style><style="accent-gn"> equal to 45%</style> of ATK (CD: <style="accent-gn">1s</style>)

103701.Content: Landing a <style="emph-gn">Lucky Strike</style> triggers <style="emph-gn">Lightning Chain</style>, dealing DMG equal to <style="accent-gn">1%</style> <style="emph-gn">Max HP</style> (CD: <style="accent-gn">1s</style>)

103801.Content: <style="emph-gn">Crit Rate</style><style="accent-gn"> +30%</style>. For any permanent Crit Rate above <style="accent-gn">50%</style>, every <style="accent-gn">2%</style> is converted to <style="accent-gn">1%</style><style="emph-gn"> Crit DMG</style> (up to <style="accent-gn">50%</style>)

104001.Content: When landing a Crit hit, deals additional AoE DMG equal to <style="accent-gn">200%</style> ATK at the target location (CD: <style="accent-gn">1s</style>). This AoE DMG is guaranteed to crit. For each "Brutality" entry owned, this damage's final DMG <style="accent-gn">+50%</style>.

104101.Content: Crits reduce the cooldowns of all skills by <style="accent-gn">0.5s</style> (triggers at most once every <style="accent-gn">1s</style>)

104201.Content: Gains 1 stack of Reaper's Sigil with each Crit. Upon reaching <style="accent-gn">20</style> stacks, increases <style="emph-gn">Crit DMG</style> by <style="accent-gn">30%</style> for <style="accent-gn">5s</style>

104601.Content: When damage dealt is not a critical hit, <style="emph-gn">Crit</style> is increased by <style="accent-gn">50%</style> until the next critical hit

104701.Content: Within <style="accent-gn">15s</style> after casting an Ultimate Skill, all damage is guaranteed to be a Crit

104901.Content: For every enemy defeated, <style="emph-gn">Crit</style> increases by <style="accent-gn">0.3%</style> (up to <style="accent-gn">100</style> stacks)

105101.Content: When landing a Crit hit, deals additional AoE DMG equal to <style="accent-gn">200%</style> ATK at the target location (CD: <style="accent-gn">1s</style>). This AoE DMG is guaranteed to be a Lucky Strike.

105201.Content: Crits increase <style="emph-gn">Elemental Damage</style> by <style="accent-gn">1%</style> for <style="accent-gn">5s</style>, up to <style="accent-gn">15</style> stacks

105301.Content: Crits increase <style="emph-gn">Attack SPD</style> by <style="accent-gn">1%</style> and <style="emph-gn">Casting SPD</style> by <style="accent-gn">2%</style>, up to <style="accent-gn">15</style> stacks

105401.Content: The first Crit upon entering combat increases <style="emph-gn">Crit DMG</style> by <style="accent-gn">500%</style>

105501.Content: For every <style="accent-gn">3</style> Crits, the next Crit's <style="emph-gn">Crit DMG</style> increases by <style="accent-gn">50%</style> and resets the counter

105801.Content: Special Attack Crits summon a Muku Chief Battle Imagine (CD: <style="accent-gn">15s</style>)

105901.Content: Luck Effect: Deals AoE DMG equal to <style="accent-gn">200%</style> ATK at the target location (CD: <style="accent-gn">0.5</style>). For each "Luck" entry owned, this damage's final DMG increases by <style="accent-gn">50%</style>.

106001.Content: Increases <style="emph-gn">Luck effect DMG</style> by <style="accent-gn">30%</style>. For each Luck entry, deals <style="accent-gn">8%</style> bonus DMG

106101.Content: Upon entering combat, <style="emph-gn">Luck</style> increases by <style="accent-gn">5%</style> every <style="accent-gn">1s</style>, up to <style="accent-gn">20</style> stacks

106201.Content: Luck effect: Gain a <style="emph-gn">Shield</style> equal to <style="accent-gn">20%</style> of <style="emph-gn">Max HP</style> for <style="accent-gn">2s</style>

106301.Content: For every <style="accent-gn">50</style> Lucky Strikes on the primary target, increases the <style="emph-gn">cooldown recovery speed</style> of all skills by <style="accent-gn">100%</style> for <style="accent-gn">15s</style> (paused while active)

106401.Content: For the first <style="accent-gn">30s</style> after entering combat, all damage dealt is guaranteed to trigger a Lucky Strike

106501.Content: When dealing damage or healing triggers a Lucky Strike, the next Lucky Strike's <style="emph-gn">ATK</style> increases by <style="accent-gn">+40%</style>

106701.Content: When dealing damage or healing triggers a Lucky Strike, <style="emph-gn">Elemental Damage</style> increases by <style="accent-gn">1%</style> for <style="accent-gn">5s</style>, up to <style="accent-gn">15</style> stacks

106801.Content: When dealing damage or healing triggers a Lucky Strike, <style="emph-gn">Attack SPD</style> increases by <style="accent-gn">1%</style> and <style="emph-gn">Casting SPD</style> increases by <style="accent-gn">2%</style>, up to <style="accent-gn">15</style> stacks

106901.Content: For every enemy defeated, <style="emph-gn">Luck</style><style="accent-gn"> increases by 0.3%</style> (up to <style="accent-gn">100</style> stacks)

107001.Content: Every <style="accent-gn">15s</style>, <style="emph-gn">Lucky Strike Damage</style> increases by <style="accent-gn">40%</style> for <style="accent-gn">8s</style>

107301.Content: When dealing damage triggers a Lucky Strike, summon a Wind Goblin King to aid you in battle (CD: <style="accent-gn">20s</style>)

107401.Content: When an Ultimate Skill triggers a Lucky Strike, summon a Lizardman Hunter (CD: <style="accent-gn">20s</style>)

107701.Content: Damage dealt by Battle Imagine is guaranteed to crit and the <style="emph-gn">Crit DMG</style> is increased by <style="accent-gn">50%</style>.

107801.Content: Battle Imagine gains a <style="accent-gn">100%</style> <style="emph-gn">Elemental Damage</style> bonus

108001.Content: Every Battle Imagine permanently increases <style="emph-gn">ATK</style> by <style="accent-gn">0.5%</style> (up to <style="accent-gn">60 stacks</style>)

108101.Content: Final damage dealt <style="accent-gn">-40%</style>. Final damage dealt by Battle Imagine <style="accent-gn">+40%</style>

108201.Content: Battle Imagine heals for <style="accent-gn">5%</style> of damage dealt

108401.Content: Special Attacks randomly summon a <style="emph-gn">Goblin Imagine</style> (CD: <style="accent-gn">20s</style>)

108501.Content: Expertise Skills randomly summon an <style="emph-gn">Animal Imagine</style> (CD: <style="accent-gn">20s</style>)

108601.Content: Battle Imagine simultaneously summons a <style="emph-gn">Goblin Crossbow Imagine</style> (CD: <style="accent-gn">30s</style>)

108701.Content: Ultimate Skills randomly summon a <style="emph-gn">Highland Character Imagine</style> (CD: <style="accent-gn">30s</style>)

108801.Content: For each active Battle Imagine buff, <style="emph-gn">damage</style> increases by <style="accent-gn">4%</style> and <style="emph-gn">damage taken</style> is reduced by <style="accent-gn">2%</style>

108901.Content: Ultimate Skills simultaneously summon a <style="emph-gn">Muku Warrior Imagine</style> (CD: <style="accent-gn">30s</style>)

109001.Content: When HP falls below <style="accent-gn">50%</style>, summons a <style="emph-gn">Muku King Imagine</style> (CD: <style="accent-gn">30s</style>)

109201.Content: Upon entering combat, immediately summons a <style="emph-gn">Tempest Ogre Imagine</style> (CD: <style="accent-gn">30s</style>)

109301.Content: When dealing damage or healing triggers a Lucky Strike, randomly summons a <style="emph-gn">Luck Imagine</style> (CD: <style="accent-gn">30s</style>)

109501.Content: When your Class Skills deal damage, restores <style="accent-gn">1%</style> HP to yourself and nearby allies and grants a <style="accent-gn">15%</style> <style="emph-gn">ATK</style> bonus for <style="accent-gn">3s</style> (CD: <style="accent-gn">0.3s</style>).

109601.Content: When Elemental Damage changes, nearby allies gain <style="accent-gn">20%</style> <style="emph-gn">Elemental Damage</style> for <style="accent-gn">10s</style>

109701.Content: When <style="emph-gn">Crit/Luck/Haste/Mastery/Versatility</style> changes, nearby allies gain a <style="accent-gn">10%</style> increase of the corresponding stat for <style="accent-gn">10s</style>

109801.Content: For each ally within 15m, <style="emph-gn">damage</style> increases by <style="accent-gn">8%</style> and <style="emph-gn">damage taken</style> is reduced by <style="accent-gn">4%</style>

109901.Content: Healing grants the target <style="accent-gn">10%</style> <style="emph-gn">PHY Boost</style> and <style="emph-gn">MAG Boost</style> for <style="accent-gn">3s</style>

110001.Content: Ultimate Skills grant a Resource Aura for <style="accent-gn">15s</style>, which increases the <style="emph-gn">Combat Resource Acquisition Efficiency</style> of nearby allies by <style="accent-gn">+100%</style> (Only one effect can be active at a time)

110101.Content: Healing grants the target <style="accent-gn">10%</style><style="emph-gn">DMG Reduction</style> for <style="accent-gn">3s</style>

110201.Content: Reduces damage dealt by enemies within 10m by <style="accent-gn">10%</style>

110301.Content: Healing grants a <style="emph-gn">Shield</style> equal to <style="accent-gn">20%</style> of <style="emph-gn">Max HP</style> for <style="accent-gn">10s</style>. Each target can only receive this shield once every <style="accent-gn">10s</style>

110701.Content: After an Ultimate Skill is cast, a Healing Aura that lasts for <style="accent-gn">10s</style> is created. Every second, it will heal allies within 15m by <style="accent-gn">100%</style> of ATK. (CD: <style="accent-gn">30s</style>)

110801.Content: When casting an Expertise Skill, you gain a Lucky Aura for <style="accent-gn">10s</style>, applying the <style="emph-gn">Lizardman Hunter Imagine</style> passive effect to allies within 15 meters (CD: <style="accent-gn">30s</style>; this effect does not stack).

110901.Content: After a Special Attack is used, a Crit Aura that lasts for <style="accent-gn">5s</style> is created, increasing the <style="emph-gn">Crit DMG</style> of allies within 15m by <style="accent-gn">+3%</style>.

111001.Content: Healing with Class Skills causes damage to be built up. When this stored damage reaches <style="accent-gn">10000%</style> of ATK, the next damage-dealing attack will also trigger an AoE blast that inflicts damage equal to the stored amount. (triggers at most once every <style="accent-gn">1s</style>)

111101.Content: Every second, damage is dealt to a random target nearby. The damage dealt is equal to the <style="emph-gn">amount of Healing</style> done by Class Skills during this period.

111201.Content: When healing is applied, summons a <style="emph-gn">Basilisk Imagine</style> (CD: <style="accent-gn">30s</style>).

111301.Content: When healing is applied, summons a <style="emph-gn">Brigand Chief Imagine</style> (CD: <style="accent-gn">30s</style>).

111401.Content: When healing is applied, summons a <style="emph-gn">Beehive Imagine</style> (CD: <style="accent-gn">30s</style>).

111501.Content:
Dealing damage with Iaido Slash is guaranteed to trigger Bladewind Domain. Bladewind Domain's CD reduction for Oblivion Combo is increased by 300%. Only one Bladewind Domain can be active at a time (Requires the Bladewind Domain Talent).

Available only in [Nightmare].

111601.Content:
Doubles the Thunder Sigil limit. Overdrive​'s Thunder Sigil recovery efficiency is increased by 300%.

Available only in [Hard] and [Nightmare].

111701.Content:
​Iaido Slash​'s CD is reduced by 50%, and Iaido Slash's Dream DMG is increased by 50%.

Available only in [Hard] and [Nightmare].

111801.Content:
Doubles Ultimate Slash's Crit DMG.

Available only in [Nightmare].

111901.Content:
Casting Dracoflash or Phantom Slash extends Volt Surge's duration by 10s. Dracoflash and Phantom Slash's Dream DMG is increased by 500%.

Available only in [Nightmare].

112001.Content:
During Volt Surge, Crits from Flash Strike and Raijin Dash will reset their CDs. Flash Strike and Raijin Dash's Dream DMG is increased by 50%.

Available only in [Nightmare].

112101.Content:
Thunder Cut's Movement Speed is reduced by 50%, and Thunder Cut's Dream DMG is increased by 60%.

Available only in [Hard] and [Nightmare].

112201.Content:
Doubles the efficiency of gaining Thundrage.

Available only in [Hard] and [Nightmare].

112301.Content:
Moonstrike no longer consumes Thunder Sigils, and casting Moonstrike will trigger Storm Scythe (requires the Storm Scythe Talent).

Available only in [Hard] and [Nightmare].

112401.Content:
Increases Divine Sickle's max stacks by 7. Casting Divine Sickle consumes all stacks, increasing Dream DMG by 15% per stack.

Available only in [Nightmare].

112501.Content:
When casting Divine Sickle, Moonblades will also simultaneously summon Divine Sickle.

Available only in [Hard] and [Nightmare].

112601.Content:
Increases the max number of Moonblades by 2.

Available only in [Nightmare].

112701.Content:
For every 5 times Thunderstrike is triggered, the next Thunderstrike will also trigger a Thunderstorm.

Available only in [Hard] and [Nightmare].

112801.Content:
Divine Sickle is cast automatically. Each cast reduces the CD of Stormflash by 2s.

Available only in [Nightmare].

112901.Content:
Thunderstrike and Storm Scythe can now trigger a Lucky Strike.

Available only in [Hard] and [Nightmare].

113001.Content:
Lucky Strike Multiplier is increased by 100%. Luck Boost is doubled.

Available only in [Nightmare].

113101.Content:
When Frostbeam hits a target, Cold Pulse counter is increased by 5, and Cold Pulse Crit DMG is increased by 50%. (Triggers only once per cast, even on multiple hits.)

Available only in [Hard] and [Nightmare].

113201.Content:
Each time Cold Pulse is triggered, the CD of Permafrost is reduced by 1s.

Available only in [Hard] and [Nightmare].

113301.Content:
When Cold Pulse deals damage, it permanently increases Ice Attack by 2 points. (Triggers only once per cast, even on multiple hits.)

Available only in [Nightmare].

113401.Content:
When Cold Pulse deals damage, it increases Ice Arrow damage by 5% for 5s. This effect stacks up to 50 times. (Triggers only once per cast, even on multiple hits.)

Available only in [Nightmare].

113501.Content:
While in the Ultra Cold state, Frozen Gale gains the Permafrost effect, and its Dream DMG is increased by 200%.

Available only in [Hard] and [Nightmare].

113601.Content:
For every 10 times Frostbeam deals damage to the main target, it randomly triggers Water Vortex, Tidal Vortex, or Crystal Veil (if equipped). Frostbeam's Dream DMG is increased by 100%.

Available only in [Nightmare].

113701.Content:
When Crystal Veil's frozen explosion occurs, it creates a Tidal Vortex at its location that lasts for 5s (this Tidal Vortex will not split again). When this triggers a Freeze effect, the CD of Crystal Veil is reduced by 3s.

Available only in [Hard] and [Nightmare].

113801.Content:
After its frozen explosion, Tidal Vortex splits into two new Tidal Vortexes (they will not split again). Tidal Vortex's Dream DMG is increased by 200%.

Available only in [Nightmare].

113901.Content:
Every 1.5s, Crystal Veil fires a Piercing Ice Lance at a random target (or forward if there is no target). When Piercing Ice Lance deals damage, the CD of Crystal Veil is reduced by 0.3s.

Available only in [Nightmare].

114001.Content:
Reduces the count required for Piercing Ice Lance by 5.

Available only in [Hard] and [Nightmare].

114101.Content:
When casting Frost Lance with more than 2 Frost Crystals, it will consume 1 additional Frost Crystal to trigger Frost Lance twice consecutively. Frost Lance's Dream DMG is increased by 50%.

Available only in [Nightmare].

114201.Content:
When Piercing Ice Lance deals damage, the CD of Permafrost is reduced by 0.3s.

Available only in [Hard] and [Nightmare].

114301.Content:
Casting Crystal Veil also casts Blizzard. When Blizzard deals damage, the CD of Crystal Veil is reduced by 0.3s.

Available only in [Hard] and [Nightmare].

114401.Content:
Blizzard becomes an instant cast, and it summons three at once. Blizzard's Dream DMG is increased by 200%.

Available only in [Hard] and [Nightmare].

114501.Content:
Every 5 casts of Meteor Storm summons a meteor from the Ultimate, which instantly puts Blizzard on CD and reduces Permafrost's CD by 5s. The Ultimate's Dream DMG is increased by 200%.

Available only in [Nightmare].

114601.Content:
Permanently enter the Endless Cold state, which grants double damage. Each stack of Frost Crystal additionally increases Attack Speed by 10%.

Available only in [Nightmare].

114701.Content:
The Ultimate also triggers Stampede of Beasts, consuming all Photon Energy to summon Wild Wolves. 1 Wild Wolf is summoned for every 20 Photon Energy consumed. This lasts for 8s.

Available only in [Nightmare].

114801.Content:
Legendary Beasts now appear simultaneously, and their effects are increased by 100%.

Available only in [Hard] and [Nightmare].

114901.Content:
Each Wild Wolf summoned reduces the CD of Focus by 5s.

Available only in [Hard] and [Nightmare].

115001.Content:
Companions gain +50% PHY Boost.

Available only in [Nightmare].

115101.Content:
Increases the attack multiplier of Arrow Rain by 10x. If more than 3 companions are on the field, each additional companion increases Final Damage by 100%.

Available only in [Nightmare].

115201.Content:
Torrent Volley is guaranteed to be a Crit. Every 1% of Crit Rate increases its Crit DMG by 10%.

Available only in [Hard] and [Nightmare].

115301.Content:
Phantom Direwolves are now considered Beasts.

Available only in [Nightmare].

115401.Content:
Storm Arrow is guaranteed to be a Crit. The Beast Mastery Talent's effect is changed to increasing Storm Arrow's Crit DMG by 300%.

Available only in [Hard] and [Nightmare].

115501.Content:
When the Falcon deals damage, 1 Photon Energy is restored, and Companion's DMG is increased by 50%.

Available only in [Hard] and [Nightmare].

115601.Content:
Explosive Arrow cannot be cast again before it detonates. The stack limit for Explosive Arrow is removed, and the stack generation efficiency from Falcon Strike is doubled.

Available only in [Nightmare].

115701.Content:
Each time Falcon Strike deals damage, the duration of Focus is extended by 0.3s. While Focus is active, Companion's Crit DMG is increased by 100%.

Available only in [Hard] and [Nightmare].

115801.Content:
Wildcall now summons two Falcons.

Available only in [Nightmare].

115901.Content:
Powerdraw now fires projectiles in three forward directions. The closer the target, the higher the damage (from a minimum of +10% to a maximum of +100%).

Available only in [Nightmare].

116001.Content:
Powerdraw Elemental Damage +100%. Deals +500% Dream DMG to targets with over 80% HP.

Available only in [Nightmare].

116101.Content:
After casting Focus, the next Powerdraw becomes a double shot. Each cast of Powerdraw also reduces the CD of Focus by 3s.

Available only in [Hard] and [Nightmare].

116201.Content:
Every Crit reduces the CD of Radiance Barrage by 0.2s. Radiance Barrage's Crit DMG is increased by 100%.

Available only in [Hard] and [Nightmare].

116301.Content:
Regen Pulse applies Thorn to the target. Thorn and Wild Seed can now trigger Lucky Strike.

Available only in [Nightmare].

116401.Content:
Feral Seed's CD is reduced by 90%, and its Casting Speed is increased by 100%.

Available only in [Hard] and [Nightmare].

116501.Content:
Regen Pulse is guaranteed to be a Crit, and its Crit DMG is increased by 2,000%.

Available only in [Nightmare].

116601.Content:
Automatically triggers when Stag Charge is gained. Increases Special Attack's Dream DMG by 400%.

Available only in [Hard] and [Nightmare].

116701.Content:
Infusion fires additional bullets at 5 surrounding targets. Infusion's Dream DMG is increased by 100%.

Available only in [Nightmare].

116801.Content:
The automatically triggered Stag Charge can now trigger Talent effects. Each time Stag Charge is triggered, Expertise Skill Damage and Luck Damage are increased by 10% for a period of time. This effect can stack up to 10 times.

Available only in [Nightmare].

116901.Content:
For every 10 times Infusion hits a target, Blossom Charge is triggered.

Available only in [Hard] and [Nightmare].

117001.Content:
When Infusion hits a target, Lucky Strike's Dream DMG is increased by 1%. This effect stacks up to 50 times and lasts for 5s.

Available only in [Hard] and [Nightmare].

117101.Content:
The damage area of the Blossom Charge summoned by Nourishing Seed is doubled, and its Dream DMG is increased by 1,000%.

Available only in [Hard] and [Nightmare].

117201.Content:
Continuously gain Regen Bud while Grove Wish is active, and it grants a 100% CD Boost for Grove Wish.

Available only in [Nightmare].

117301.Content:
Gain the Fast Growth buff when casting the Ultimate Skill (requires Fast Growth). Each time Blossom Charge is triggered, the CD of the Ultimate Skill is reduced by 1s.

Available only in [Nightmare].

117401.Content:
Doubles the number of Nourishing Seeds thrown.

Available only in [Hard] and [Nightmare].

117501.Content:
Reduces the cost of Special Attack by 90%.

Available only in [Hard] and [Nightmare].

117601.Content:
Permanently gain Vital Surge with its effect doubled.

Available only in [Hard] and [Nightmare].

117701.Content:
Grants a 50% MAG Boost and 30% Haste to all class skills, but prevents using Ultimate Skills.

Available only in [Nightmare].

117801.Content:
When Nourish's DoT reaches 3 stacks, the target is afflicted with Life Drain: For 5s, deals (MATK × 20 × Mastery%) damage per second. Each time damage is dealt, the CDs of all Expertise Skills are reduced by 1s.

Available only in [Nightmare].

117901.Content:
Wind Gate Dream DMG +50%, and Great Wind Cyclone Dream DMG +100%.

Available only in [Nightmare].

118001.Content:
Triggering Drake Cannon also triggers Great Wind Cyclone.

Available only in [Hard] and [Nightmare].

118101.Content:
Great Wind Cyclone becomes a two-hit combo. When it deals damage, your Wind Attack is permanently increased by 2 points.

Available only in [Nightmare].

118201.Content:
Reduces the CD of Galeform by 80% and doubles its effect.

Available only in [Hard] and [Nightmare].

118301.Content:
When Vortex Strike is cast as a derivative from Breach Pursuit, its Crit DMG is increased by 50% (requires the Vortex Strike Talent).

Available only in [Hard] and [Nightmare].

118401.Content:
Casting Vortex Strike consumes all Courage. For each point of Courage consumed, its Dream DMG is increased by 3%.

Available only in [Nightmare].

118501.Content:
Each cast of Vortex Strike reduces the Ultimate Skill's CD. The amount of Courage restored by Breach Pursuit is increased by 100%.

Available only in [Hard] and [Nightmare].

118601.Content:
Casting Vortex Strike permanently increases your Wind Attack by 2 points.

Available only in [Nightmare].

118701.Content:
When Azure Sever deals damage, it triggers an additional Tornado. This Tornado's Dream DMG is increased by 100%.

Available only in [Nightmare].

118801.Content:
For every 7 times a Tornado is triggered, an Enhanced Tornado is summoned, dealing damage equal to 2,000% of your ATK.

Available only in [Hard] and [Nightmare].

118901.Content:
Reduces the Sharp cost of Instant Edge to 1 and increases its Dream DMG by 50%.

Available only in [Hard] and [Nightmare].

119001.Content:
Increases Attack Speed by 100% during Wind Fury.

Available only in [Nightmare].

119101.Content:
Skyfall can now charge Sharp Impact, increasing its Dream DMG by 200%.

Available only in [Hard] and [Nightmare].

119201.Content:
Doubles the max amount of Sharp. For 10s after casting Sharp Impact, gain 1 Sharp every 0.5s.

Available only in [Hard] and [Nightmare].

119301.Content:
Instant Edge now consumes all Sharp, with each point consumed increasing its Dream DMG by an additional 10%.

Available only in [Nightmare].

119401.Content:
Wind Fury can now stack up to 3 times, with its buffs increasing proportionally.

Available only in [Nightmare].

119501.Content:
After every 10 Shield Tosses, Shield Toss will be enhanced. Tap to make the shields spin around the caster.

Available only in [Nightmare].

119601.Content:
Increases the Dream DMG of Judgment and Divine Strike by 50%.

Available only in [Hard] and [Nightmare].

119701.Content:
After casting Scorching Judgment, Dream DMG dealt is increased by 50% for its duration.

Available only in [Hard] and [Nightmare].

119801.Content:
Casting Shield Toss increases ATK by 2% for 2s. This effect stacks up to 50 times.

Available only in [Nightmare].

119901.Content:
Increases the Crit DMG of Inferno Reckon by 100%.

Available only in [Hard] and [Nightmare].

120001.Content:
During Aegis Ward, Inferno Reckon is triggered every 0.5s, and its Attack Speed is increased by 100%.

Available only in [Nightmare].

120101.Content:
Inferno Reckon can now trigger Divine Strike. The CD reduction effect of Aegis Ward's Retribution on Aegis Ward is doubled.

Available only in [Nightmare].

120201.Content:
Special Attacks can now trigger Divine Strike. Divine Strike's Dream DMG is increased by 100%.

Available only in [Hard] and [Nightmare].

120301.Content:
Reduces the CD of Radiance by 50%. During its effect, the Dream DMG dealt is increased by 20%.

Available only in [Hard] and [Nightmare].

120401.Content:
Sacred Blade deals additional fixed damage equal to 50% of Max HP. It also increases Max HP by 50%.

Available only in [Hard] and [Nightmare].

120501.Content:
Reduces the cost of Sacred Blade by 1. When Sacred Blade hits a target with a Holy Mark, Max HP is permanently increased by 200 points.

Available only in [Nightmare].

120601.Content:
Doubles the additional effects of Lightforged Barrier.

Available only in [Nightmare].

120701.Content:
Vanguard Hunt and Divine Arc Slash deal additional fixed damage equal to 50% of Max HP.

Available only in [Nightmare].

120801.Content:
Doubles the additional effects of Lightforged Barrier.

Available only in [Nightmare].

120901.Content:
Reduces the CD of Zeal Crusade by 50%. During its effect, the Dream DMG dealt is increased by 20%.

Available only in [Hard] and [Nightmare].

121001.Content:
Judgment now consumes all Photon Energy. Vanguard Hunt's Crits now grant a Holy Sigil. Judgment's Dream DMG is increased by 50%.

Available only in [Hard] and [Nightmare].

121101.Content:
Skills that consume Sand Crystals now restore them instead, and their Dream DMG is increased by 200%.

Available only in [Nightmare].

121201.Content:
Terra Sunder will consume all Sand Crystals. For each crystal consumed, its Dream DMG is increased by 50%.

Available only in [Hard] and [Nightmare].

121301.Content:
After standing still for 2s, Rock Bonus is increased by 40%.

Available only in [Hard] and [Nightmare].

121401.Content:
While Stoneform is active, energy is continuously obtained. All hits are guaranteed to Crit, and Crit DMG is increased by 200%.

Available only in [Nightmare].

121501.Content:
Each time Shield Echo is triggered, Star Shatter deals bonus damage equal to 100% of the current Shield value (this bonus is affected by Star Shatter's damage increase).

Available only in [Nightmare].

121601.Content:
Shield Echo has a 30% chance of triggering Weakness Strike. When triggered, Weakness Strike deals bonus damage equal to 100% of the current Shield value (this bonus is affected by Weakness Strike's damage increase).

Available only in [Hard] and [Nightmare].

121701.Content:
When Weakness Strike is triggered, the CD of Sandshroud is reduced by 1s.

Available only in [Hard] and [Nightmare].

121801.Content:
Max Shield value can now be increased to 1,000%. Participating in a kill increases Shield Strength by 5%.

Available only in [Nightmare].

121901.Content:
Casting Granite Fury guarantees Rageblow, and Rageblow's Dream DMG is increased by 100%.

Available only in [Hard] and [Nightmare].

122001.Content:
For every 20 times Stone Fist is triggered, a giant rock is summoned to fall on the target, dealing damage equal to 3% of the target's current HP.

Available only in [Nightmare].

122101.Content:
While in Countercrush, the Rock Bonus is increased by 25%.

Available only in [Hard] and [Nightmare].

122201.Content:
Each time Granite is triggered, Rock Attack is permanently increased by 2 points.

Available only in [Nightmare].

122301.Content:
Granite Fury's cost is reduced by 1, and Granite Fury will extend the duration of Countercrush. Granite Fury's Dream DMG is increased by 100%.

Available only in [Hard] and [Nightmare].

122401.Content:
Countercrush deals bonus damage equal to 0.1% of the target's current HP.

Available only in [Nightmare].

122501.Content:
While in Countercrush, Countercrush's Rock Bonus is increased by 50%.

Available only in [Hard] and [Nightmare].

122601.Content:
Each time Countercrush is triggered, Rock Attack is permanently increased by 2 points.

Available only in [Nightmare].

122701.Content:
For 10s after casting Center Stage, Harmonic Anthem will be at maximum stacks, and its Dream DMG is increased by 300%.

Available only in [Hard] and [Nightmare].

122801.Content:
Triggering a Lucky Strike reduces the CDs of Harmonic Anthem and Center Stage by 0.5s.

Available only in [Hard] and [Nightmare].

122901.Content:
Casting Rhapsody of Flame permanently increases Fire Attack by 2 points each time.

Available only in [Nightmare].

123001.Content:
Attack Speed is increased by 60% while in Rhapsody of Flame.

Available only in [Nightmare].

123101.Content:
Dream DMG is increased by 50%. When Heroic Melody is active, Rhapsody of Flame will be active.

Available only in [Nightmare].

123201.Content:
Lucky Strike's DMG Multiplier is increased by 40%. Special Attacks can now trigger Encore.

Available only in [Hard] and [Nightmare].

123301.Content:
For 10s after casting an Ultimate, all Performance Passion will be recovered every second.

Available only in [Nightmare].

123401.Content:
Triggering a Lucky Strike reduces the Ultimate Skill's CD by 0.5s.

Available only in [Hard] and [Nightmare].

123501.Content:
Passion Burst is permanently replaced with Passion Fury. This requires the Passion Fury Talent to be activated. Dream DMG is also increased by 300%.

Available only in [Hard] and [Nightmare].

123601.Content:
Passion Fury fires 2 additional projectiles. Elemental Bonus is also increased by 500%.

Available only in [Nightmare].

123701.Content:
Casting Encore summons a sound system in front of the caster that lasts for 15s.

Available only in [Nightmare].

123801.Content:
When Passion Fury deals Crit DMG, it triggers Encore Strings on a random target (up to once every 0.5s).

Available only in [Hard] and [Nightmare].

123901.Content:
Special Attack's cost is changed to 1, and Special Attack's healing is increased by 500%.

Available only in [Hard] and [Nightmare].

124001.Content:
For 10s after casting Concert Circuit, an explosion occurs around the caster every second, dealing damage equal to 2,000% of ATK.

Available only in [Hard] and [Nightmare].

124101.Content:
Fivefold Crescendo no longer consumes Performance Passion. Casting a Special Attack reduces the CDs of Fivefold Crescendo and the modified Ultimate by 1s.

Available only in [Nightmare].

124201.Content:
Permanently increases Intellect by 1 point each time Healing Melody deals damage.

Available only in [Nightmare].
